title: AI Search & LinkedIn: 5 Takeaways from 9.5 Million Citations
author: Chris Hackney (CPO, Meltwater)
key_findings: LinkedIn is #2 most-cited source for LLMs (after YouTube) — 26% citation share growth in 4 weeks
75% of LinkedIn citations come from individual member profiles, 25% from Company Pages
CEOs produce most cited content (8.2%), founders close behind (7.5%)
Structured content dominates: articles/posts = 83% of citations, listicles = 54% of most cited, headings in 92% of successful posts
72% of cited content is original (not reshared), 48% published within last 3 months, only 12% older than 1 year
LinkedIn gets 11x more citations than Quora, outpaces Reddit
LinkedIn dominates B2B queries: Technology & SaaS, Consulting, Financial Services, FinTech, Marketing & Advertising, HR & Talent
Top 5 actionable takeaways: turn expertise into content, answer real buyer questions, structure for clarity with headings/lists/dates, prioritize original insights, stay consistent with fresh content
nebula_implications: Founder-run company — founders are 2nd most-cited role at 7.5% — Mike's personal LinkedIn content has high citation potential
Nebula's trigger-based ICP (founders bleeding money on ads) directly maps to B2B queries AI models answer
Structured audit output (scored 8-dimension JSON) is exactly the format AI cites — Nebula already produces this
Need to publish 2-3 posts/week + 3-4 articles/month to maintain freshness signal
Listicles/comparisons (which Nebula now publishes) are 54% of most cited content — highest-ROI format
Content calendar now includes Listicle and Comparison job types with freshness_signal field
actions_taken: Created AI_Citation_Content_Structure_Guide.md (7-section guide: hierarchy, lists, entities, data, originality, freshness, decision-framing) with pre-publish scoresheet
Wrote compare/landing-page-audit-tools.html — 5-tool comparison listicle (Nebula, PageSpeed, Hotjar, Zamp, Oxygen) across 5 dimensions, with structured JSON-LD for AI extraction
Updated build_content_calendar() to include Listicle + Comparison job types with AI citation format metadata and freshness_signal field
Updated tests to assert 5 job types, format field, and freshness_signal field
